testsuite.name: purchase.country

testcase.name: validationForCountryField
testcase.system-out: select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Email test case will run for this PSPCardsIntegrations :- mantapay Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 55.3 Generated First Name: john6f7 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo68bde@gmail.com Country: I → Status: 400 Response Body: { "message": "Please submit Valid Alpha2 Country Code Ex:(AF,IN) in \"country\" parameter", "code": "transaction_error" } PASS → Country rejected correctly as expected: I

testcase.name: validationForCountryField
testcase.system-out: Email test case will run for this PSPCardsIntegrations :- mantapay Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 55.3 Generated First Name: john5c8 Generated Email: nairobiPalermoee363@gmail.com Country: USA1 → Status: 400 Response Body: { "message": "Please submit Valid Alpha2 Country Code Ex:(AF,IN) in \"country\" parameter", "code": "transaction_error" } PASS → Country rejected correctly as expected: USA1

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Skipping test - Empty email or card number User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Email test case will run for this PSPCardsIntegrations :- mantapay Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 55.3 Generated First Name: john6f7 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo68bde@gmail.com Country: I → Status: 400 Response Body: { "message": "Please submit Valid Alpha2 Country Code Ex:(AF,IN) in \"country\" parameter", "code": "transaction_error" } PASS → Country rejected correctly as expected: I User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Email test case will run for this PSPCardsIntegrations :- mantapay Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 55.3 Generated First Name: john5c8 Generated Email: nairobiPalermoee363@gmail.com Country: USA1 → Status: 400 Response Body: { "message": "Please submit Valid Alpha2 Country Code Ex:(AF,IN) in \"country\" parameter", "code": "transaction_error" } PASS → Country rejected correctly as expected: USA1 User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Email test case will run for this PSPCardsIntegrations :- mantapay Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 55.3 ✅ Amount within valid range.
